2605.24202.title: When Does Multi-Agent RL Improve LLM Workflows? Workflow, Scale, and Policy-Sharing Tradeoffs
2605.24202.paper_summary: Multi-agent LLM workflows route inference through specialized roles to lift end-task accuracy, but jointly training those roles with reinforcement learning is unstable in ways that are poorly understood. We study when end-to-end RL training of multi-agent LLM workflows improves over their base models, comparing Shared-Policy training, where all roles update one policy, with Isolated-Policy training, where each role has its own parameters. Our experimental matrix spans Eval-Opt, Voting, and Orch-Workers workflows, math and code tasks, and three model scales (0.6B, 1.7B, 4B). We find that multi-agent RL usually improves over base models, but gains depend jointly on workflow, task, and scale, not on policy sharing alone. Isolated-Policy tends to reach higher peak accuracy yet more often falls off a terminal accuracy cliff, while Shared-Policy training does not eliminate failure; it redistributes failure into qualitatively different patterns. We then explain the strongest of these patterns through role-level gradient dynamics induced by workflow topology and policy routing: under Isolated-Policy, parallel same-role agents on shared prompts amplify per-role gradients and drive terminal degradation in Voting and Orch-Workers workflows; under Shared-Policy, asymmetric per-step gradient mass causes the shared policy to be captured by the dominant role, producing different failure signatures by task and workflow. Together, the empirical map and its underlying mechanisms show that policy sharing routes training pressure through different channels rather than offering uniform stability, making it a design choice with workflow- and task-conditional tradeoffs.
2605.24202.paper_summary_zh: 多智能體 LLM 工作流程透過專門角色進行推理，以提升最終任務的準確性，但使用強化學習共同訓練這些角色的穩定性不佳，且其原因尚未充分理解。<lb/>我們研究多智能體 LLM 工作流程的端到端強化學習訓練何時能改善其基礎模型，並比較共享策略訓練（所有角色更新同一策略）與孤立策略訓練（每個角色擁有自己的參數）。<lb/>我們的實驗矩陣涵蓋了 Eval-Opt、Voting 和 Orch-Workers 工作流程、數學和代碼任務，以及三個模型規模（0.6B、1.7B、4B）。<lb/>我們發現多智能體強化學習通常能改善基礎模型，但增益共同依賴於工作流程、任務和規模，而不僅僅是策略共享。<lb/>孤立策略往往達到更高的峰值準確性，但更常會掉入終端準確性的懸崖，而共享策略訓練並不消除失敗；它將失敗重新分配為質量上不同的模式。<lb/>然後，我們通過工作流程拓撲和策略路由引起的角色級梯度動態解釋這些模式中最強的：在孤立策略下，共享提示上的平行同角色代理放大每個角色的梯度，並驅動 Voting 和 Orch-Workers 工作流程中的終端退化；在共享策略下，不對稱的每步梯度質量導致共享策略被主導角色捕獲，從而根據任務和工作流程產生不同的失敗特徵。<lb/>總體而言，實證圖譜及其潛在機制顯示，策略共享通過不同的通道路由訓練壓力，而不是提供統一的穩定性，這使其成為一種具有工作流程和任務條件權衡的設計選擇。
2605.24202.author: Yifan Zeng et.al.
2605.24202.authors: Yifan Zeng, Yiran Wu, Yaolun Zhang, Wentian Zhao, Kun Wan, Qingyun Wu, Huazheng Wang
